Mobile Auto Detailing · Independence & Manchester, IA

Full
Detail

Inside and out. Interior detail + exterior hand wash. Starting at $235.

Book Now Call (319) 327-7939

Our Best Value Service

Inside & Out. Top to Bottom.

Our full detail combines a complete interior detail — including carpet and seat shampoo with stain removal — with a thorough exterior hand wash. Everything cleaned inside and out for one great price.

This is the best value for customers who want their vehicle to look and feel completely renewed — inside and out. Popular with customers throughout Independence, Manchester, and surrounding Iowa communities.

Best Value
Starting at $235
Price varies by vehicle size and condition

What's Included

Everything. Every Surface.

Interior

  • Full vacuum — seats, floors, trunk, crevices
  • Carpet & seat shampoo + stain removal
  • Dashboard, console & door panel detail
  • All vents and buttons cleaned
  • Windows and mirrors (inside)
  • Floor mat cleaning
  • Full interior wipe down

Exterior

  • Hand wash (two-bucket method)
  • Wheel and tire cleaning & dressing
  • All windows streak-free
  • Door jambs cleaned
  • Spot-free rinse

Available Add-Ons

Spray Wax +$30
Clay Bar & Decon +$30
